metadata.description: Unique prefix for globally-unique resource names
Storage account name (globally unique, lowercase, no hyphens)
Azure region for the Log Analytics workspace
Name of the Log Analytics workspace
Name of the Azure Container Registry (must be globally unique)
Name of the Storage Account (must be globally unique, lowercase, no hyphens)
Name of the SQL logical server

monolithConnectionString.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName')), '2023-08-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, 'job-board-monolith', parameters('adminLogin'), parameters('adminPassword'))]

microConnectionString.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName')), '2023-08-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, 'job-board', parameters('adminLogin'), parameters('adminPassword'))]

metadata.description: Name of the App Configuration store
Managed identity principal ID for Data Reader role
ACR resource ID for AcrPull role assignment
Key Vault resource ID for Secrets User role assignment
Storage Account resource ID for Blob Contributor role assignment
Name of the Container Apps Environment
Redis connection host:port for Dapr state store
Redis password for Dapr state store
RabbitMQ host for Dapr pub/sub (internal Container App FQDN)
Key Vault name for Dapr secret store
Managed identity client ID for Key Vault access
Azure App Configuration connection string for Dapr config stores
Target port the container listens on

configuration.dapr: [if(parameters('daprEnabled'), createObject('enabled', true(), 'appId', parameters('daprAppId'), 'appPort', parameters('daprAppPort'), 'appProtocol', 'http'), createObject('enabled', false()))]

envVars.value: [union(variables('commonBackendEnvVars'), createArray(createObject('name', 'Keycloak__Authority', 'value', format('https://{0}/realms/job-board', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'keycloak'), '2025-04-01').outputs.keycloakFqdn.value)), createObject('name', 'Keycloak__Audience', 'value', 'jobboard-api')), createArray(createObject('name', 'AiServiceUrl', 'value', 'http://ai-service-v2'), createObject('name', 'AdminApiUrl', 'value', 'http://admin-api'), createObject('name', 'MonolithUrl', 'value', 'http://monolith-api'), createObject('name', 'ConnectionStrings__Redis', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'redis'), '2025-04-01').outputs.redisConnectionString.value)))]
